ddls:
CREATE TABLE "animals" (
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each animal */,
  "type" INTEGER /* Type of animal (e.g., dog, cat) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the animal */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the animal */,
  "breed1" INTEGER /* Primary breed of the animal */,
  "breed2" INTEGER /* Secondary breed of the animal */,
  "gender" INTEGER /* Gender of the animal */,
  "color1" INTEGER /* Primary color of the animal */,
  "color2" INTEGER /* Secondary color of the animal */,
  "color3" INTEGER /* Tertiary color of the animal */,
  "maturity_size" INTEGER /* Maturity size of the animal */,
  "fur_length" INTEGER /* Length of the animal's fur */,
  "vaccinated" INTEGER /* Vaccination status of the animal */,
  "dewormed" INTEGER /* Deworming status of the animal */,
  "sterilized" INTEGER /* Sterilization status of the animal */,
  "health" INTEGER /* Health status of the animal */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of animals available for adoption */,
  "fee" REAL /* Adoption fee for the animal */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the animal is located */,
  "rescuer_id" TEXT /* ID of the rescuer who brought the animal to the shelter */,
  "video_amt" TEXT /* Number of videos available for the animal */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the animal */,
  "photo_amt" INTEGER /* Number of photos available for the animal */,
  "adoption_speed" TEXT /* Adoption speed of the animal */,
  "intake_date" TEXT /* Date when the animal was brought into the shelter */,
  "intake_reason" TEXT /* Reason why the animal was brought into the shelter */,
  "spayed_neutered_date" TEXT /* Date when the animal was spayed/neutered */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date when the animal was last vaccinated */,
  "deworming_date" TEXT /* Date when the animal was last dewormed */,
  "microchip_id" TEXT /* Unique microchip identifier for the animal */,
  "behavioral_assessment" TEXT /* Results of the behavioral assessment */,
  "special_needs" TEXT /* Any special needs or requirements of the animal */,
  "adoption_status" TEXT /* Current status of the animal (e.g., available, in foster care, adopted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("animal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animals_rescuer_id FOREIGN KEY ("rescuer_id") REFERENCES rescuers ("rescuer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rescuers" (
  "rescuer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each rescuer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the rescuer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the rescuer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the rescuer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the rescuer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the rescuer is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the rescuer is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the rescuer's location */,
  "rescue_organization" TEXT /* Name of the rescue organization the rescuer is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rescuer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adopters" (
  "adopter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adopter */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the adopter */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the adopter */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the adopter */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the adopter */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the adopter is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the adopter is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the adopter's location */,
  "home_type" TEXT /* Type of home (e.g., house, apartment) */,
  "family_size" INTEGER /* Number of people in the adopter's family */,
  "other_pets" TEXT /* Information about other pets in the household */,
  "adoption_reason" TEXT /* Reason for adopting (e.g., companion, therapy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adopter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adoptions" (
  "adoption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adoption */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the animal being adopted */,
  "adopter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the adopter */,
  "adoption_date" TEXT /* Date of the adoption */,
  "adoption_fee_paid" REAL /* Amount of adoption fee paid */,
  "adoption_status" TEXT /* Status of the adoption (e.g., pending, completed, cancelled) */,
  "adoption_counselor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the adoption counselor who processed the adoption */,
  "adoption_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the adoption */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adoption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adoptions_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adoptions_adopter_id FOREIGN KEY ("adopter_id") REFERENCES adopters ("adopter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "foster_care" (
  "foster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each foster care assignment */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the animal being fostered */,
  "foster_care_provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the foster care provider */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the foster care assignment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the foster care assignment */,
  "foster_care_status" TEXT /* Status of the foster care assignment (e.g., active, completed, cancelled) */,
  "foster_care_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the foster care assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("foster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_foster_care_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_foster_care_foster_care_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("foster_care_provider_id") REFERENCES foster_care_providers ("foster_care_provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "foster_care_providers" (
  "foster_care_provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each foster care provider */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the foster care provider */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the foster care provider */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the foster care provider */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the foster care provider */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the foster care provider is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the foster care provider is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the foster care provider's location */,
  "home_type" TEXT /* Type of home (e.g., house, apartment) */,
  "family_size" INTEGER /* Number of people in the foster care provider's family */,
  "other_pets" TEXT /* Information about other pets in the household */,
  "foster_care_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience in foster care */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("foster_care_provider_id")
)
